title: SkyFall | The Orbital Strike Cannon
description: A Remade Version Of World Orbital. Bigger and Better
body:
This is a full remake of my original mod World Orbital, but this version is way better, now a plugin, with tons of new features, improvements, and enhancements for everyone to enjoy and have lots of fun.

Easy to Use!

Command /osc

How to make **NUKE** | /osc give nuke Rings *number* RingSpacing *number* (personally I use 12 rings, and 12 block spacing)


How to make **STAB** | /osc give stab (no customization)



**IMPORTANT**

IN YOUR SERVER, GO INTO THE SPIGOT.YML FILE AND SET MAX-TNT-PER-TICK TO: 1000000
